title: asplenium micantifrons
intro: Asplenium micantifrons, also known as the shining spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily in the treatment of digestive issues and respiratory problems, including coughs and colds. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving congestion. In herbal preparations, Asplenium micantifrons is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, or applied topically as a poultice to aid in the healing of wounds and skin irritations.
